app.name: Salone Explorer
app.tagline: Discover Sierra Leone, one attraction at a time.
home.hero.title: Discover Sierra Leone
home.hero.subtitle: From Tiwai's primates to Bintumani's peaks — your guide to the places that define this extraordinary country.

footer.tagline: Your guide to the places that define Sierra Leone.
footer.links.heading: Explore
disclaimer.short: For demonstration and educational purposes only. Confirm details with operators before travelling.
disclaimer.full: This application is built for demonstration and educational purposes only. It is not an official tourism service. Information is curated from public sources and may be out of date — confirm details with the operator before travelling.
about.heading: About Salone Explorer
about.brand: Salone Explorer is published by FambulTik, TpGroup's heritage-and-diaspora brand. Fambul Tik — Krio for 'family stick' — is TpGroup's symbol of diaspora-to-homeland connection. Our mission is to help diaspora members reconnect with their roots and to welcome all visitors to one of West Africa's most remarkable countries.
about.disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
about.sources.heading: Data Sources
about.sources.intro: Attraction information is paraphrased from these authoritative sources:
about.ds.credit: Interface designed with the TpGroup Design System.
